pages.text: $(italic)Create Enchantment Industry$() makes $(bold)Experience$() a fluid you can pump, store, and spend by machine.$(br2)In Novus you already make liquid XP by $(l:2_processing/pressing)pressing$() blossom and ancient seeds. This addon is what lets you $(italic)use$() it at scale.
pages.title: Liquid Experience

pages.text: $(bold)What it enables:$()$(br)$(li)Automatic $(bold)enchanting$() — spout liquid XP onto items through a deployer/enchanting setup.$(li)$(bold)Printer$() — copy written books and filled maps automatically.$(li)$(bold)Disenchanter$() — pull enchantments back out into XP.$(li)$(bold)Hyper-Experience$() — a concentrated XP fluid for the hungriest setups.
pages.title: What It Enables
